description: Hey everyone, I have 2 pies available today. One is a Key Lime and the other is a delicious Coconut Cream. Let me know if you would like to have one or both of these. They will go fast!! Call 303-921-8381 to claim yours right away.

antiPatterns: No fake Google star widgets unless review_score provided. No SaaS feature grids. Food sites should feel sensory (texture, warmth, appetite), not corporate.
photoInventory: You will receive 5 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
